source_title: MULTIFIX S ULTRA Knotless Suture Anchor - product brochure
text: MULTIFIX™ S ULTRA Knotless Suture AnchorMultiple fixation options, a streamlined technique ideal for multi-suture constructs The MULTIFIX S ULTRA Anchor provides multiple fixation options as well as a streamlined technique ideal in multi-suture constructs allowing surgeons to meet the needs of a diverse patient population. MULTIFIX™ S ULTRA Knotless Suture Anchor Accessories 3.4mm bone punch (OM-9420) Tapered punch (OM-9220) 3.4mm 30.5mm MULTIFIX S ULTRA Anchor specifications 21mm 25mm 9mm 4.2mm 5.5mm 22mm Pre-deployed Deployed Multiple fixation options The MULTIFIX™ S ULTRA Anchor allows the surgeon to create various biomechanically stable constructs with two bone lock options. Streamlined technique • Pound-in technique (bone hole may be required) • Suture lock with the turn of a dial • Hand tension sutures for tactile feedback Ideal in multi-suture constructs • Accommodates 2-4 suture strands to allow multiple construct configurations 1. Insert PEEK tip into bone 2. Tension sutures 3. Turn dial to lock sutures * Reference P/N 52553-01 and 47901-02. The results of in vitro simulation testing have not been proven to predict clinical performance. Test results pertain only to the two suture testing 5.5mm MULTIFIX S ULTRA Anchor 6.5mm MULTIFIX S ULTRA Anchor 200 — 150 — 100 — 50 — 0 — Pull-out force (N) Functional testing 20/8 lb. foam* Ordering information MULTIFIX™ S ULTRA Knotless Suture Anchor Reference # Descript ion_______________________________________________________________________________________________ OM-1300 MULTIFIX P 4 .5mm Knotless Suture Anchor 72290001 MULTIFIX S UL TRA 5.5mm Knotless Suture Anchor 72290002 MULTIFIX S UL TRA 6.5mm Knotless Suture Anchor OM-9420 Bone Punch 3.4mm OM-9220 Ta pered Punch OM-9615 SPEEDSCREW™ Insert ion Guide and Obturator 22-4038 FIRSTP ASS™ ST Suture Passer, Self-capture 22-4039 FIRSTP ASS ST Suture Passer, Standard ArthroCare Corporation 7000 West William Cannon Drive Austin, TX 78735 USA www.smith-nephew.com Order Entry: 1-800-343-5717 Order Entry Fax: 1-888-994-2782 ©2016 Smith & Nephew. ™Trademark of Smith & Nephew. P/N 67690.EN Rev. A 04/16 Supporting healthcare professionals for over 150 years The FIRSTPASS ST Suture Passer is a single- use suture passer pre-loaded with a needle and sterile packed allowing for immediate out- of-the-box use. FIRSTPASS™ ST Suture Passer Available in both standard and self-capturing solutions FEATURE BENEFITS Pre-loaded and sterile packed for single case use • Eliminates the time and inconvenience associated with sterilizing a reusable suture passer • Needle loading and unloading are no longer required • No capital cost or instrument maintenance needed Round, pre-curved nitinol needle • Provides added strength and reliability • Suture is carried in a recess on the needle which helps maintain suture integrity Deep bite Allows for tissue manipulation and suture passage through cuff tissue, up to 10mm in thickness and 18mm in bite depth Ability to pass MAGNUMWIRE™, ULTRABRAID™ and ULTRATAPE™ sutures The surgeon is not limited by suture type and can make product decisions based on the repair needs Features and benefits Round pre-curved needle for reliability and strength Two step trigger to grasp tissue and deploy needle Standard Self-capturing
